pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: ANT 0.66s/lap faster on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: ANT +0 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: ANT tyres degrade 0.078s/lap less on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 9 vs 10 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 18 (4374-4632 m): 0.275 s to HAM [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~14 m later than HAM (entry); ANT carries ~2 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 7 (1544-1801 m): 0.118 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. HAM brakes ~24 m later than ANT (entry); HAM carries ~19 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 4 (772-1029 m): 0.099 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. HAM brakes ~40 m later than ANT (entry); HAM carries ~10 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).

where.headline: ANT gained in 9 of 20 micro-sectors
